title: Actions of nilpotent groups on nilpotent groups
abstract:
AbstractFor finite nilpotent groups 
$J$
 and 
$N$
, suppose 
$J$
 acts on 
$N$
 via automorphisms. We exhibit a decomposition of the first cohomology set in terms of the first cohomologies of the Sylow 
$p$
-subgroups of 
$J$
 that mirrors the primary decomposition of 
$H^1(J,N)$
 for abelian 
$N$
. We then show that if 
$N \rtimes J$
 acts on some non-empty set 
$\Omega$
, where the action of 
$N$
 is transitive and for each prime 
$p$
 a Sylow 
$p$
-subgroup of 
$J$
 fixes an element of 
$\Omega$
, then 
$J$
 fixes an element of 
$\Omega$
.
